text.title: Competitive Intelligence Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) for the artefact this methodology produces. The validator script enforces required keys plus per-field constraints; forbidden patterns enumerate shapes the agent must never emit.

example.note: ttl_days exceeds the 14-day cap; events array empty (no provenance); claims and fact_checker_passed missing; generated_at absent.

list.pattern: Any claim without an event_id reference.
Collector emits a synthesised multi-change event instead of one per delta.
Distributed battlecard with generated_at + ttl_days < now().
